name: What damages for lost career from work illness in Salt Lake City?

mainEntity.name: What damages for lost career from work illness in Salt Lake City?

acceptedAnswer.description: Permanent total disability benefits at 2/3 wages for life if unemployable.[4] Utah awards based on impairment plus non-medical factors.[4] Key factors: (1) total hindrance proof; (2) age/skills; (3) ISIF involvement. Vocational expert helps. Can yield high lifetime value.
